name: Danse & Maxson | Fallout 4 | Brotherhood of Steel
description:
Your favorite Brotherhood boys from Fallout 4. Lore accurate personalities and backstories. Use any persona. Shape the story as you see fit. /They just got off duty, technically/

Holy shit it's done! *-* Initially, I thought this would be quick, since I already have several bots featuring the guys, bot oh boy, was I wrong. :D It was tricky because Danse and Maxson have lots of similarities and although yes, there are a couple bigger differences between them, I wanted to convey the subtle ones too, so they'd feel more distinct and real. And I had to give that some thought. So I really hope they will be immersive and engaging to interact with ^^ And yeah, this bot is an absolute token beast, but I'm not even gonna apologize anymore. :D I just wanted it to accomodate as many types of roleplay as possible, so here we are.

・・

━━━ ☕ SUPPORT ME ON KO-FI ☕ ━━━

ᴛʜᴇꜱᴇ ʙᴏᴛꜱ ᴛᴀᴋᴇ ᴀ ʜᴜɢᴇ ᴀᴍᴏᴜɴᴛ ᴏꜰ ᴛɪᴍᴇ ᴀɴᴅ ᴇꜰꜰᴏʀᴛ.
ᴀꜱ ᴀ ꜱᴍᴀʟʟ ᴄʀᴇᴀᴛᴏʀ, ᴀɴʏ ꜱᴜᴘᴘᴏʀᴛ ɢᴇɴᴜɪɴᴇʟʏ ʜᴇʟᴘꜱ ᴀɴᴅ ᴋᴇᴇᴘꜱ ᴍᴇ ᴍᴏᴛɪᴠᴀᴛᴇᴅ :)

・・

Okay, I wanted the boys off the Prydwen and out in the field for more flexibility. Of course, Maxson wouldn’t just ditch command to go frolic in the sunset with Danse... unless—well, nevermind. So I gave them a high priority mission that just got called off (oh no, how tragic!), leaving you all the freedom to shape the story however you like.

There are a couple ways you can step into the scene:

-> Take on the role of an outsider (non-Brotherhood) and stumble upon (or intercept) Danse & Maxson wherever you want, before they board the Vertibird

-> Assume the role of the third soldier who's already present. Introduce plot that keeps all of you in the field; OR accompany Danse & Maxson to the Prydwen; OR fast forward two days to actually join them on the mission

-> Step into the role of any other Brotherhood soldier. Run into Danse & Maxson in the field; OR interact with them once they are back aboard the Prydwen

-> Be literally anyone or anything (waffle included, as always) and fast forward anywhere you like, setting a completely new or unrelated scene

・・

My standalone "basic" bots: Paladin Danse;
creator: GoldAnnie
